summary: Tested v0.097 features: Cast search with skill filters, actor age filtering, 1v1-only challenges with $50,000 cost/$100,000 prize, Film Comico subgenre, release notes v0.097. Backend 21/22 tests passed (only /api/health 404 as expected - endpoint doesn't exist). Frontend all flows working. Fixed Link2 import error in DownloadAppPage.jsx.

minor.issue: Returns 404 - endpoint does not exist, use /api/user instead for health check

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: Link2 icon was used in DownloadAppPage.jsx line 231 but not imported - added to lucide-react imports
Verified: Challenges button re-enabled in navbar (App.js line 347-357)
Verified: Infrastructure button disabled with opacity-40 and cursor-not-allowed (App.js line 311-321)
Verified: Marketplace disabled in navItems array (App.js line 217)
Verified: FilmWizard has age filter buttons: Giovani, 18-30, 31-50, 51+ (FilmWizard.jsx line 1016-1035)
Verified: FilmWizard shows fixed film info bar from step 2 onwards (FilmWizard.jsx line 1176-1188)
Verified: ChallengesPage shows only 1v1 - no 2v2/3v3/4v4/FFA cards present
Verified: ChallengesPage shows Costo: $50.000 and Premio: $100.000
Verified: Backend /api/challenges/create rejects non-1v1 types with 400 error
Verified: Backend /api/cast/skill-list/{type} returns skill lists for actor/director/screenwriter/composer
Verified: Backend /api/cast/search-advanced works with skill filters
Verified: Genres endpoint has 'Film Comico' and 'Commedia Italiana' in comedy subgenres
Verified: Release notes v0.097 is current version with correct changelog items
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing test account
context_for_next_testing_agent: v0.097 features fully tested. Key features: 1) Challenges re-enabled with only 1v1 mode, $50K cost, $100K prize. 2) Actors endpoint supports age filtering (min_age, max_age params). 3) Cast search-advanced endpoint for skill-based filtering. 4) FilmWizard has age filter buttons on step 7 (cast selection). 5) Film info bar visible from step 2 onwards. 6) Infrastructure and Marketplace remain disabled. 7) Bozze and Pre-Ingaggio are separate nav items. 8) Link2 icon fix applied to DownloadAppPage.

backend_endpoints./api/cast/skill-list/{type}: PASS - Returns 13+ skills per cast type with key and Italian label
backend_endpoints./api/cast/search-advanced: PASS - Filters cast by up to 3 skills with min_value
backend_endpoints./api/actors?min_age&max_age: PASS - Age filtering works correctly for all ranges
backend_endpoints./api/challenges/create: PASS - Only accepts 1v1, rejects 2v2/3v3/4v4/ffa with 400 error
backend_endpoints./api/genres: PASS - Comedy has Film Comico and Commedia Italiana subgenres
backend_endpoints./api/release-notes: PASS - v0.097 is current version with all expected changes

frontend_features.challenges_button_enabled: PASS - Swords icon in navbar, not disabled
frontend_features.infrastructure_disabled: PASS - Has opacity-40, cursor-not-allowed, disabled prop
frontend_features.marketplace_disabled: PASS - navItems array has disabled: true
frontend_features.challenges_page_1v1_only: PASS - Only SFIDA 1 VS 1 card shown, no 2v2/3v3/4v4/FFA
frontend_features.film_wizard_age_filters: VERIFIED IN CODE - Age filter buttons on step 7 (Giovani, 18-30, 31-50, 51+)
frontend_features.film_wizard_info_bar: PASS - Fixed bar shows film title and genre from step 2 onwards
frontend_features.bozze_preingaggi_separate: PASS - Both visible as separate nav items
